warnings: Large drift in Fukui charge conservation suggests a possible non-convergence of the N+1 and N−1 states, with the sums f+ and f− both approximately 1.0000, but indicating the N+1 state might not have fully converged.

prose: Fukui reactivity analysis on aniline was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with def2-tzvp basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The most electrophilic site has Fukui + approximately 2.2976 at a carbon atom, and the most nucleophilic site has Fukui - approximately 0.2045 at the nitrogen atom. The method was B3LYP/def2-tzvp in gas phase with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The calculation results include site-specific Fukui indices and indicated some convergence warnings.
